column1: # ESP-IDF partition table for OTA dual-slot updates.
# Note: app slots must be 64 KB aligned. Each slot must be large enough for
# the firmware image (current release build is well under 1 MB).
# The `fobs` partition uses subtype `nvs` so the bootloader treats it as a
# generic data region; the firmware writes a custom ping-pong + CRC layout

column2: not the ESP-IDF NVS key/value format.
